title: Brochure droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Brochure droids''' were employed by [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and tourism information centers to help tourists find their way when they arrived at their destination. Brochure [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were equipped with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] for travel and conversed in an enthusiastic, cheerful, [[Vocabulator/Legends|mechanical voice]]. They were programmed to recognize various body types, [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] requirements, and languages. This helped brochure droids to recommend various nearby attractions, help a tourist find lodgings and eating establishments, and instruct tourists on how to arrange tours.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''

[[Category:Class three droid models|*]]
[[Category:Droid classifications|3]]
